chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Dawud Ibn Abi Zayd

text: ه عن داود بن أبي زيد فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن عيسى بن عبيد، عن داود بن أبي زيد.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Dawud ibn Abi Zayd has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn 'Isa ibn 'Ubayd, from Dawud ibn Abi Zayd.
